text:
- Update to 1.0.2
- Take maintainership

Makefile changed:
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+PORTDOCS=
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}

Changed and refined:
+LIB_DEPENDS=
 pkg-descr

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
